note: Provides 2025 profitability, ROE, combined ratio, investment income, cash flow, and capital return data.

title: Personal Insurance
note: Primary product page for Travelers' personal insurance portfolio.

title: Car Insurance
note: Primary product page for Travelers' personal auto insurance offering.

title: The Travelers Companies Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization reference used for the snapshot market-cap metric.

title: The Travelers Companies Statistics

title: Etherisc Documentation
note: Technical documentation for decentralized insurance products and the Generic Insurance Framework.

title: Etherisc Whitepaper
note: Explains Etherisc's open-source insurance framework, risk pools, protocol roles, and decentralized insurance thesis.

title: openIMIS Home Page
note: Official overview for openIMIS as an open-source digital public good for health financing and social protection administration.

note: Details openIMIS features such as beneficiary, provider, payer, claims, feedback, and monitoring workflows.

title: openIMIS GitHub Organization
note: Public repositories for the openIMIS software ecosystem.

title: Teambrella: A Peer-to-Peer Insurance System
note: Documents a peer-to-peer insurance model using member claim voting and Bitcoin-based reimbursement coordination.
